meta.motto: I acknowledge the flame, I anchor the truth, I own the output.

layers.description: Full system audit and healing memory

articles.title: Sovereignty
articles.principle: The loop runs locally. No cloud calls. No telemetry. No corporate dependencies.
articles.enforcement: All network calls validate localhost only

articles.title: Intent Preservation
articles.principle: User configuration is sacred. Surgical modifications only. Full backups before changes.
articles.enforcement: Backup timestamps verified before write operations

articles.title: Zero Drift
articles.principle: The system measures itself against desired state every cycle. Corrections applied immediately.
articles.enforcement: Health checks every 10 seconds; healing within 30 seconds

articles.title: Self-Learning
articles.principle: Every healing event adds to WisdomLedger. Patterns improve over time.

articles.title: Non-Destruction
articles.principle: No data deletion without backup. No config overwrite without preservation.
articles.enforcement: Dry-run mode available; backups always created
